Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x29DB "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Rock'n Wrestle (J1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $1980 lda #$30 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rock'n Wrestle (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Inserted RLE packed colour RAM data to dump file at $1980 to restore before starting the game.
